rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMOND L. MAR REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent?S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amended Response To Petition To Modify Trust, To Compel Co-Trustees To Account, To Declare Deeds Void, For Redress Of Breaches Of Trust; To Enjoin Co-Trustees From Taking Action To Evict Petitioner From Trust Property; And To Disqualify Respondent?S Law Firm; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Supporting Declarations
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Hon. Judge Ross C. Moody. Respondents Antoinette Mallette and Veronica Ligne Mar's Motion for Leave to File Amended Response to Petition to Modify Trust, to Compel Co-Trustees to Account, to Declare Deeds Void, for Redress of Breaches of Trust, to Enjoin Co-Trustees from Taking Action to Evict Petitioner From Property, and to Disqualify Respondents' Law Firm is GRANTED. Respondents are granted leave to file an amended response to the Petition, adding a fifth affirmative defense based on Respondents' reliance on advice of their counsel. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 473(a).) Correspondence between parties' counsel in late 2021, submitted as exhibits to the declaration of attorney for Respondent's Michael Spalding, indicates the parties had agreed to stipulate to this amendment to the response. No stipulation has been filed. Petitioner did not file an opposition to the motion. There is no showing on this record that the motion for leave to amend is untimely or that granting this motion would prejudice Petitioner. Respondents are ordered to lodge with the clerk in Department 204 a proposed order consistent with this tentative ruling, as published above, by the time set for this hearing. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the court day before the hearing. Remote appearance is strongly encouraged, in conformity with the current General Order of the Probate and Mental Health Division, available on the court's website at https://sfsuperiorcourt.org/divisions/probate To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 87580177925 and passcode 722809. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 87580177925 and passcode 722809. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
